Facilitator Notes

Architecture Diagram

Labs

Agent Service Introduction

Lab 00 Workshop setup and access verification

Lab 01 Hosted agents with framework-orchestrated ReAct

Lab 02 Prompt-based agents with tool calling

Lab 03 Multi-agent as tools

Lab 04 Microsoft Agent Framework in Python

Lab 05 Foundry IQ multi-source retrieval

Lab 06 Foundry Toolkit for VS Code tasks

Lab 07 Foundry Toolboxes (optional)

Lab 08 Agent ID and publishing

On this page

Instructor Guide ​

Delivery goals ​

  • Keep modules interactive and time-boxed.
  • Encourage pair troubleshooting before solution reveal.

Suggested pacing ​

  • Follow the agenda in /README.md.
  • Skip Lab 07 if the workshop time is under 3.5 hours.
